overall.description: A ship simulator game showing a first-person view from the bridge of a vessel navigating through a stormy night. The scene features three navigation monitors displaying radar and charts, with occasional lightning illuminating the rough seas ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: ship bridge navigation station during night storm

agents.ego_description: operating the ship's navigation systems while moving steadily through rough seas

entered.detail: left screen displaying nautical chart with yellow landmasses and white vessel icon
central circular radar screen with rotating yellow sweep arm showing surrounding contacts
right screen showing blue depth profile or sonar data with brown seabed line
triangular bow deck of the ship with metal railings and red navigation lights
dark metal window supports and pillars framing the forward view
dark turbulent water with visible wave motion stretching to the horizon

segments.scene_description: The view from a ship's bridge shows three navigation monitors displaying charts and radar data. The vessel moves forward through dark, stormy waters at night, with the bow deck visible through the bridge windows.

scene_state.functional_zone: ship bridge navigation station during active lightning storm

events.description: bright lightning bolt flashes on the left side, temporarily illuminating the ocean and clouds

agents.ego_description: continuing to navigate through the storm as lightning strikes nearby

entered.detail: bright jagged electrical discharge visible through the left window illuminating the sea

segments.scene_description: The ship continues through the storm as a lightning bolt strikes on the port side, briefly lighting up the dark ocean. The navigation monitors remain active with the radar sweep rotating continuously.

scene_state.functional_zone: ship bridge navigation station during ongoing storm

events.description: second lightning bolt flashes on the left side, again illuminating the stormy seas

agents.ego_description: maintaining course through rough seas as another lightning strike occurs

entered.detail: second bright electrical discharge visible on the left horizon

segments.scene_description: The vessel continues its journey through the stormy night as a second lightning bolt illuminates the port side. The ship's bow cuts through the rough waters while the navigation systems continue to track the vessel's progress.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective from a ship's bridge as it navigates through a dark, stormy night punctuated by flashes of lightning. It begins with a view of three active navigation monitors displaying radar and charts while the vessel pushes forward into the oppressive darkness. As the ship continues its journey, a sudden bolt of lightning strikes the port side, momentarily transforming the pitch-black ocean into a starkly illuminated seascape. The scene then maintains its forward momentum through the rough waters, with the radar sweep rotating continuously before a second flash of lightning again brightens the horizon. Finally, the camera remains fixed on the bow cutting through the waves as the navigation systems steadily track the vessel's progress through the storm.
